errors.description: Tenant lacks the `chargeback_management` gate. Response includes upgrade CTA.
Tenant does not permit evidence submission (chargeback_evidence_submission entitlement off). Evidence deadlines will lapse -> auto-loss.
RDR path requires Medium+ tier (`chargeback_rdr`).
CE3.0 evidence builder requires Medium+ tier (`chargeback_ce3`).
Rich chargeback reports require Medium+ tier (`chargeback_advanced_reporting`).
Network must be one of: visa / mastercard / amex / discover / jcb / unionpay / diners / other.
Reason code is not valid for the declared network. e.g. Visa reason codes on Mastercard chargebacks refuse.
Reason category must be one of: fraud / authorization / processing_errors / consumer_disputes / card_recovery.
amount_cents must be positive integer.
Chargeback amount exceeds the un-refunded portion of the parent payment (payment.amount_cents - payment.amount_refunded_cents).
Chargeback currency must match parent payment currency (no multi-currency chargebacks).
Parent payment_id does not exist or is soft-deleted.
Cannot chargeback a payment that is not in succeeded status.
invoice_id does not match parent payment.invoice_id.
payment_dispute_id references a dispute for a different payment than chargeback.payment_id (escalation guard).
Cannot escalate from a PaymentDispute that is not in status='lost'.
The requested state transition is not permitted by the chargeback state machine.
Chargeback terms (network / reason_code / amount / currency / fee / payment_id / invoice_id / provider) cannot be edited once evidence submission starts.

P1 signal. Attempted mutation of a terminal chargeback. Chargebacks are IMMUTABLE post-terminal (won / lost / expired / accepted_refund). Corrections require ops investigation + manual reversal transaction.
chargeback_number is immutable — sequential generator handles allocation; direct mutation refused.
evidence_due_by can only be extended (never shortened) and only while status='pending_evidence'.
The evidence deadline has passed. Use `chargeback:mark-lost-manually` to acknowledge miss instead of submitting late evidence.
Evidence submission not permitted — parent chargeback is not in a submitting state (pending_evidence / evidence_submitted).
Evidence body does not match schemas/chargeback-evidence.schema.json.
P1 signal. Evidence body contains a PAN pattern (13-19 digit string matching card BIN prefix). PCI-DSS Req 3.4 refuses card storage anywhere. Strip the PAN + resubmit with only tokens + last-4 + BIN.
The submitter does not hold chargebacks.submit-evidence permission.
Two evidence rows for the same chargeback cannot share submission_attempt_number (composite unique refused).
Evidence rows are immutable append-only audit. Corrections require submitting a new attempt with submission_attempt_number + 1.
Direct mutation of rdr_eligible refused — the flag is computed at creation from network + amount + entitlement + payment history.
This chargeback is not RDR-eligible (Visa-only, below threshold, tenant entitled, unrefunded payment). Use evidence submission or manual mark-lost instead.
Direct mutation of ce3_eligible refused — the flag is computed at creation from network + reason_category + entitlement + customer purchase history.
P1 signal. Provider webhook signature verification failed. Delegated to payment::PaymentWebhookVerifier.
Provider webhook timestamp is older than the replay-window. Delegated to payment::PaymentWebhookVerifier.
P1 signal. The chargeback transaction failed to commit atomically with its finalization chain (two offsetting transactions + invoice state update + clawback fan-out + marketing negative-conversion).
P1 signal. FinalizeChargebackJob step failed. Chargeback stays in terminal status with metadata.finalization_error set for retry via chargeback:reconcile admin CLI.
P1 signal. ChargebackClawbackReferral or ChargebackClawbackCoupon downstream event failed to process. Retried up to 5 times before dead-lettering.
P1 signal. Rate crossed VDMP/MDMP threshold. NOT an error response — surfaces as a data field in the report response + fires ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded event.
